limit.description: Number of results to return per page.

offset.description: The initial index from which to return the results.

search.description: Match against member `first_name`, `last_name`, and `email`. Returns case-insensitive substring matches and fuzzy trigram matches (typos, prefix-as-you-type) together, ordered exact-first; each result's `search_match_type` is `exact` or `similar`. Capped at 200 characters.
